title: Expert Login | Psychology Direct
description: Access your cases, documents, and communications. Log in to your Psychology Direct expert account.

blocks.headline: Access Your Expert Portal
blocks.subtitle: Access your cases, assessments, and communications with Psychology Direct.

blocks.text: Not yet registered? Join our network of 1,000+ psychologists and psychiatrists. Access regular referrals, fair fees, and support.

blocks.heading: Interested in Joining?
blocks.bodyText: We work with independent experts nationwide. Join our network for regular referrals, fair fees, and professional support.

faqs.question: Where do I log in?
faqs.answer: Click the Log In to Portal button above. You'll access our secure Zoho portal.

faqs.question: What are my login credentials?
faqs.answer: You should have received login instructions when you joined. Check your email, including spam. If missing, see the help section below.

faqs.question: I've forgotten my password. How do I reset it?
faqs.answer: On the Zoho login page, click Forgot your password? You'll receive an email with password reset instructions.

faqs.question: I don't have login credentials. Who do I contact?
faqs.answer: Email professionals@psychologydirect.co.uk with your name and details. We'll provide login credentials immediately.

faqs.question: Can I access the portal on my phone?
faqs.answer: Yes. The portal is mobile-responsive and works on all devices including iPhone, Android, tablet, and desktop.

faqs.question: I get an error when I try to log in. What should I do?
faqs.answer: First, check email and password are correct. If the error persists, try clearing cache and cookies, a different browser, or a different device. Contact us if it continues: professionals@psychologydirect.co.uk or 01306 879 975.

faqs.question: What cases can I see in the portal?
faqs.answer: You can see cases assigned to you by Psychology Direct. You cannot see other experts' cases.

faqs.question: How do I upload my completed assessment report?
faqs.answer: Log in, navigate to your case, and use the Upload Report button. Follow file format guidelines. Your Client Manager will review and send to client.

faqs.question: Is the portal secure?
faqs.answer: Yes. The portal uses encrypted connections and follows GDPR standards. Case information is protected.

faqs.question: I have a question about a case assignment. Who do I contact?
faqs.answer: Message your dedicated Client Manager through the portal (listed on your case). They can answer questions about instructions, logistics, or timelines.

faqs.question: Can I track payment status in the portal?
faqs.answer: Yes. Your billing section shows all invoices, payment status, and payment history. You can also download invoices for your records.

faqs.question: I'm interested in joining the Psychology Direct network. How do I start?
faqs.answer: Visit /about/careers/ for information about joining. Or email professionals@psychologydirect.co.uk and we'll send you an information pack.

blocks.heading: Why Psychologists & Psychiatrists Join Psychology Direct

cards.title: Regular Referrals
cards.description: Access a steady stream of cases nationwide. No more chasing referrals — we bring work to you.

cards.title: Fair Fees
cards.description: Competitive rates, transparent billing, and fast payment. No surprises or disputes.

cards.title: Admin-Free
cards.description: We handle all the admin, scheduling, and client communication. You focus on assessments.

cards.title: Professional Support
cards.description: Access resources, templates, compliance guidance, and professional development.

cards.title: Quality Clients
cards.description: Work with solicitors, LAs, and schools who value quality expertise and professional practice.

blocks.heading: Ready to Join Our Network?
blocks.bodyText: Psychologists and psychiatrists nationwide are part of our network. Access regular work, fair fees, and professional support.
